name: Phil Wang
bio: Phil Wang is a Malaysian-British stand-up comedian and writer, born in Stoke-on-Trent and raised in Kota Kinabalu, who often mines his mixed heritage for material. He won the 2010 Chortle Student Comedian of the Year before becoming a panel-show regular and member of the sketch group Daphne. He has released two Netflix stand-up specials, Philly Philly Wang Wang and Wang In There, Baby.

timeline.ev: Wins Chortle Student Comedian of the Year
Netflix special Philly Philly Wang Wang released
Netflix special Wang In There, Baby released

accolades: Chortle Student Comedian of the Year (2010)

bits.yt_title: We need to talk about Chinese stereotypes 😳 | Live At The Apollo - BBC
